mapper.select: SELECT * FROM agent_connection WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = #{status}
mapper.update: UPDATE agent_connection SET status = 'OFFLINE' WHERE status = 'ONLINE' AND last_seen_at < #{threshold}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO agent_connection (id, user_id, ak_id, device_name, mac_address, os, tool_type, tool_version, status, last_seen_at, created_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{akId}, #{deviceName}, #{macAddress}, #{os}, #{toolType}, #{toolVersion}, #{status}, #{lastSeenAt}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM agent_connection WHERE ak_id = #{akId} ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE agent_connection SET status = #{status}, device_name = #{deviceName}, mac_address = #{macAddress}, os = #{os}, tool_version = #{toolVersion}, last_seen_at = #{lastSeenAt} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE agent_connection SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE agent_connection SET last_seen_at = #{lastSeenAt} WHERE id = #{id}
